summary: auth login persists browser cookies via a new Config.SaveCookies (writes the `cookies` field) instead of SaveTokens (which wrote access_token).
reason: The novel internal/svc client reads cfg.AnkiwebCookies (the `cookies` TOML key); storing cookies in access_token left that field empty after restart, so every cookie-authenticated svc endpoint returned 401/403 while auth status falsely reported Authenticated.
validated_outcome: go build and go vet pass; gofmt clean. SaveCookies also clears the bearer slots so AuthHeader() no longer masks an empty-cookie state.
